title: Max Villager Enchants
description: Librarians enchanting books always give max enchants
body:
Max Villager Enchants is as what the title itself says,  
  
When a villager makes a new enchant trade, it will always give the max level possible for the enchanted books it offers

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ed54d41f40b03d6266de16ef110291e86e2c81f.png)](https://discord.gg/S9kUFsmw2f)
